title: (Senior) Projektmanager Geotechnik für Energiewendeprojekte (w/m/d)
required_skills: Degree in Civil Engineering with specialisation in Geotechnics or comparable
Several years experience in geotechnical large-scale projects (energy transition: HVDC, pipeline)
Deep expertise in geotechnics and/or engineering/hydrogeology
Experience in geotechnical investigations, analysis and reporting
Structured approach and strong organisational talent
bonus_skills: Specific knowledge of routing new construction projects in energy transition
Experience with horizontal/pressure drilling, HDD, micro-tunnel construction
matched_skills: Project management coordination: HSBC programme coordination
missing_skills: Infrastructure project management in energy/construction sector
Very good German (B1 vs required very good)
core_responsibilities: Technical responsibility for planning, tendering, and supervision of ground investigation services
Steer and technically lead project teams for geotechnical consulting services
Project management of complex infrastructure projects across Germany
Optimise planning processes in large projects
Guide junior engineers in the project team
summary: Score 10.0 (poor match). This is a highly specialised geotechnics/civil engineering role with requirements fundamentally outside Boru's background. An engineering degree and geotechnical expertise are mandatory. Not applicable.
